description_long: This object is a firearm with a sleek, elongated barrel and a dark metallic finish, featuring a textured brown grip panel on the handle. The frame is robust and angular, with a prominent trigger guard and a visible trigger. The slide is smooth and unadorned, lacking any ribbing or venting, and the muzzle is circular and slightly recessed. The grip appears to be made of a different material, likely wood or a polymer, with a diamond-patterned texture for improved handling. The rear of the object shows a hammer and rear sight, while the front view reveals a simple, round barrel opening. The overall design is compact and utilitarian, with no visible external magazine tube or pump mechanism.
description: A dark metallic firearm with a long barrel, brown textured grip, and a simple, utilitarian design. The object features a rounded trigger guard and a smooth slide.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, brown textured grip, and the trigger guard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the hammer, rear sight, and the narrow profile of the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip texture, trigger, and the overall slimness of the frame.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the circular barrel opening and the smooth, unadorned slide.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no ribbing or venting visible, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
